chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 314 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 30-05-2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Ajeebullah Junejo, Advocate for respondents No.5 to 7 a/w Muhammad Paryal Indhar, Junior Clerk on behalf of respondent No.6. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for respondent No.6 files progress report while learned AAG files comments on behalf of respondent No.3, which are take on record and copies whereof are supplied to learned AAG and learned counsel for the petitioner. It is informed that an amount of Rs. 13,02,315/- being service benefits of the petitioner’s husband is payable to the petitioner. As per learned counsel for the respondents, Town Committee Pano Akil is facing financial constraint and in this regard, it has written a letter to the Finance Department, Government of Sindh to provide funds to clear the service benefits of the deceased husband of the petitioner. Let on the next date of hearing, respondent No.5 submit details of expenditure of Town Committee, Pano Akil for last six months regarding payment of fuel charges/bills, which must be duly audited by the Assistant Director, Local Fund Audit, Sukkur with details of vehicles, fire tenders, garbage carriers, under use of Town Committee Pano Akil. Besides, respondent No.5 is also directed to submit detailed 2 report of last three years with regard to sanctioned posts of Town Committee Pano Akil and details of present employees working in said Town Committee. He is also directed to submit report with regard to employees of fire brigade station Pano Akil with categorical statement regarding employees, who are working in fire brigade station on deputation basis.

Besides, respondent No.5 is also directed to submit detailed 2 report of last three years with regard to sanctioned posts of Town Committee Pano Akil and details of present employees working in said Town Committee. He is also directed to submit report with regard to employees of fire brigade station Pano Akil with categorical statement regarding employees, who are working in fire brigade station on deputation basis. Adjourned to 13.06.2023. Office is directed to supply copy of this order to learned counsel for the respondents-Town Committee Pano Akil for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
